title: Awakening Beneath the Waves
summary: The party awakened in Tidewarden recruit bodies inside the Barracks of Tides, began academy life, met Squad 9, completed training exercises, and received their first assignment: patrol the Silvered Market.
majorScenes: Awakening in the Barracks of Tides
unresolvedQuestions: Why did the party awaken in different bodies?
Why do some memories feel unfamiliar?

title: The Missing Child
summary: Nella Tidehopper disappeared, leading the recruits through the Silvered Market and into the Drowned Ward tunnels. The investigation ended in tragedy and left the party with the first serious signs that something in Atlantis is being hidden.
unresolvedQuestions: What exactly happened in the tunnels?
Why does the official explanation feel incomplete?
Why are some parts of Atlantis restricted from public knowledge?

title: Shadows Beneath Atlantis
summary: Locked until the party completes Session 3.
